name: Cura / Medical Records
description: EPCR, safeguarding, patient-contact reporting, and optional operational grouping (standalone-capable).
changelog: Migration 013: cura_operational_event_assets (event PDFs + bulletins on Railway-backed uploads). Permission medical_records_module.cura_ops_event_management for non–clinical-lead ops staff. Optional Bearer analytics include_epcr_deep=1.

declared_permissions.label: Cura ops — event documents & full reporting
declared_permissions.description: Upload operational event PDFs (persistent/Railway volume), publish text bulletins, and open the extended anonymous statistics report. Admins and clinical leads already have access by role.
